Description: Collective Minds Radiology platform
Type of cost: NHS
Justification of Cost: This study requires radiographer participation in varying geographical locations to view
banks of images. Sharing large numbers of anonymised patient images to multiple NHS Trusts using the standard
methods of patient image transfer (IEP) are not appropriate. The platform can be accessed from anywhere and will
hold the image banks (as well as the qualitative surveys) for the study. The images will only be available to the
registered participants of the study through personalised passwords. The site is also fully GDPR compliant.
Studies conducted at the host organisation have used CMRAD previously, with success. The quote was for 18
months and has been allocated per the research timetable. https://about.cmrad.com/
Year 1 Year 2 Year 3 Total Cost (£)
0 7334 3667 11001
Description: Pre/post co-creation focus group patient and public participation costs
Type of cost: NHS
Justification of Cost: This covers the time for 10 patient focus group members for two sessions to discuss their
priorities for an MRI screening infographic/animation resource and their thoughts on the finalised version and how
best it can be implemented, for a maximum of 3 hours at £50. This meeting will be held online, so a cost of
£5/person to cover internet costs will be offered. This sum also includes any caring needs for the focus group
members at £25 per hour (Age UK https://www.ageuk.org.uk/information-advice/care/paying-for-care/paying-for-
homecare/).

1300 1300 0 2600
Description: Transcription service
Type of cost: NHS
Justification of Cost: This is the cost of a subscription service named 1st Class Secretarial Services to transcribe
all the focus group and co-creation group meetings. The service is anticipated to be at a Group 5 rate for focus
groups with up to 14 people involved @ £2.60 per minute with a total cost of £6240 plus VAT (Based on 40 hours
worth of audio – up to 14 speakers per session). 1st Class Secretarial services are fully GDPR compliant and
there is a pre-existing confidentiality agreement in place with The Royal Marsden. https://www.1stclass.uk.com/
Year 1 Year 2 Year 3 Total Cost (£)
0 7488 0 7488
Description: NHS Informatics Merseyside
Type of cost: NHS
Justification of Cost: This is the quote from NHS Informatics Merseyside for the production of the patient
infographic (£2410) and accompanying animation (£3615), which will be developed with my co-creation team. The
quoted price is for the production of the final infographic. However, as in any design process, there will be tweaks
and adjustments to get this to where it needs to be so this is included as part of the price. These costs are
exclusive of VAT, which is not charged for payments between NHS organisations. https://www.imerseyside.nhs.uk/
Year 1 Year 2 Year 3 Total Cost (£)
0 6025 0 6025
Description: Radiographer recruitment/participation costs
Type of cost: NHS
Justification of Cost: This cost covers the time for 100 radiographers to complete the training evaluation. This
will be used to backfill time to cover radiographers being released from clinical duty, otherwise the research
becomes infeasible. However, the costs listed are only expected if we struggle to recruit radiographers and have to
recruit directly from NHS hospitals and open them as sites. This money will only be sought if our other recruitment
methods (online, professional body etc) are not attracting sufficient numbers. Therefore, it is not expected that this
cost will be required. We have costed vouchers (£25/radiographer) in the application, awarded to radiographer
participants on completion of the 6-month post-test and questionnaire. Please see the SoECAT form for the
breakdown.
Year 1 Year 2 Year 3 Total Cost (£)
0 23500 0 23500
Description: Radiographer recuitment/participation in pre/post co-creation focus groups
Type of cost: NHS
Justification of Cost: This cost covers the time for up to 10 radiographers to participate in up to two focus group
sessions regarding the co-created infographic and animation. The costs listed are only expected if we have
recruited directly from NHS hospitals and open them as sites. This money will only be sought if our other
recruitment methods (e.g., online) are not attracting sufficient numbers. Therefore, it is not expected that this cost
will be required. Please see the SoECAT form for the breakdown.
Year 1 Year 2 Year 3 Total Cost (£)
0 1645 0 1645
Description: Thank you gesture for radiographer participants
Type of cost: NHS
Justification of Cost: This cost covers a £25 voucher for each radiographer who participates in the eLearning
training evaluation. It will be given as a thank you gesture after the 6-month test/questionnaire has been
completed. As we hope most radiographer participants will be recruited through social media or our professional
body/conferences, this will be the preferred cost. If radiographers need to be directly recruited through NHS
hospitals, this money won't be used and we would seek to use the funds detailed in the SoECAT form.

researchers
